calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant James Bliesner.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 11, 2009.
Declaration of Cheri L. Gorman in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed today, March 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against defendant James Bliesner as follows:

Principal - $3,968.74.
Prejudgment Interest - $850.72.
Attorney Fees - $720.00.
Costs - $258.00.

Total - $5,797.46.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
